name: codex-excalidraw
description: A Codex Excalidraw plugin with the official Excalidraw MCP App plus a local project-bound canvas and media-generation MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use official and local Excalidraw MCP from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Excalidraw bundles the official remote Excalidraw MCP App for prompt-to-diagram workflows and a local project-bound Excalidraw browser canvas that serves its own HTTP MCP endpoint at /mcp. Local MCP tool calls update the same canvas shown in the browser, including official-compatible read_me/create_view drawing and image/video generation tools.
defaultPrompt: Open the Excalidraw canvas for this project.
Use read_me and create_view to draw into the live local Excalidraw canvas.
Use the official Excalidraw MCP to draw an architecture diagram.
Generate a new image into the selected Excalidraw AI holder.
Generate a Grok Imagine video next to the selected Excalidraw element.
